serverInfo.name: agentic-observability-mcp
serverInfo.description: AI agent observability via MCP — trace actions, track token costs, monitor tool performance, detect anomalies, and generate audit trails
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: trace_agent_action
tools.description: Log an agent action with metadata for audit trail

tools.name: track_token_usage
tools.description: Track LLM token usage and cost per call

tools.name: log_tool_call
tools.description: Log MCP tool call with latency and success metrics

tools.name: get_session_summary
tools.description: Get cost, token, and performance summary for a session

tools.name: detect_anomaly
tools.description: Detect unusual agent behavior patterns (cost spikes, loops, errors)

tools.name: get_cost_report
tools.description: Generate cost breakdown across sessions grouped by model/tool/provider

resources.description: Current LLM pricing table for cost calculation
